parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Primitive Type
parameters.description: Select from the following types. For information on the different types, see the category articles.

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: This option is used to select the type of surface, when using a primitive type.

parameters.name: orient
parameters.label: Orientation
parameters.description: The axis along which the torus is constructed.

parameters.name: modifybounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Enabled only when an input is connected to the Torus to set bounds for the torus. Turn Modify Bounds = On to enable the transform parameters below to further modify the position and radius of the boun

parameters.name: reverseanchors
parameters.label: Reverse Anchors
parameters.description: Invert the direction of anchors.

parameters.name: anchoru
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Set the point in X about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorv
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Set the point in Y about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorw
parameters.label: Anchor W
parameters.description: Set the point in Z about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: rows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: The rows define the number of divisions along the torus.

parameters.name: cols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: The columns determine the number of divisions along the torus' cross-section.

parameters.name: angleoffset
parameters.label: Angle Offset
parameters.description: Rotates the torus along the minor radius.  For example, if using 4 rows set this value to 45 to create flat top + bottom surfaces.

parameters.name: imperfect
parameters.label: Imperfect
parameters.description: This option applies only to Bezier and NURBS types. If selected, the tube is an approximated nonrational curve, otherwise it is a perfect rational curve.

parameters.name: orderu
parameters.label: U Order
parameters.description: If a spline curve is selected, it is built at this order for U and V.

parameters.name: orderv
parameters.label: V Order
parameters.description: If a spline curve is selected, it is built at this order for U and V.

parameters.name: closeu
parameters.label: U Wrap
parameters.description: If is checked, it creates a 360 cross-section.

parameters.name: closev
parameters.label: V Wrap
parameters.description: Checking creates a torus along V by closing the primitive.

parameters.name: capu
parameters.label: U End Caps
parameters.description: If is checked, it puts faceted end-caps on the ends of the torus if it is less than 360.

parameters.name: capv
parameters.label: V End Caps
parameters.description: If is checked, it applies a face between the top and bottom of the torus - if the torus is open.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: This adds uv coordinates to the geometry created by the Torus .

parameters.name: normals
parameters.label: Compute Normals
parameters.description: Checking this option On will compute surface normals.

parameters.name: rady
parameters.label: Rady
parameters.description: The first value (radx) defines the radius of the torus, the second value (rady) determines the radius of the inner ring.  Image:TouchGeometry256.gif

parameters.name: tz
parameters.label: Tz
parameters.description: Offset of torus center from object origin.

parameters.name: endangleu
parameters.label: Endangleu
parameters.description: The start and end sweep angles of the torus, if U Wrap is not enabled.

parameters.name: endanglev
parameters.label: Endanglev
parameters.description: These are the start and end angles of the cross-section circle that is swept to make the torus, if V Wrap is not enabled.
